events.name: SELECT
events.description: Event emitted on selection change: UI:{selectEvent} with { ids, rows }.

events.name: SORT
events.description: Event emitted on sortable-header click: UI:{sortEvent} with { column, direction }.

events.name: VIEW
events.description: User opened a record from the list.

events.name: TableViewLoaded
events.description: TableView rows finished loading; payload.data holds the collection.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Accepts
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, the container accepts drops whose dragGroup matches this value (or '*' for any group)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Class Name
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the table root.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Column definitions. The compiler emits `columns`; `fields` is the alias.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dnd Item Id Field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row field used as the @dnd-kit draggable id (default 'id')

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dnd Root
overridableConfigKeys.description: Mark this container as the DnD root for its subtree — descendant zones share one DndContext (cross-container drag). Use on an outer container whose own items are not draggable.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drag Group
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, items in this container are draggable and announce this group as their source

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drop Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired on cross-container drop. Payload: { id, sourceGroup, targetGroup, newIndex }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Empty Message
overridableConfigKeys.description: Message shown when there are no rows.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Error
overridableConfigKeys.description: Error state.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Alias for `columns`.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Group By
overridableConfigKeys.description: Group rows under section headers by a field value.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Is Loading
overridableConfigKeys.description: Loading state.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment — mirrors the data-list / entity-table look enum so authors share one knob name across row renderers.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max Inline Actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max inline action buttons before the rest collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Omit = all inline.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page Size
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max rows before a 'Show More' button. Defaults to 0 (show all).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Position Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired N times per drop (one per item in affected zones) so the trait can persist new positions for the WHOLE zone, not just the moved item. Payload: { id, position }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Reorder Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired on in-container reorder. Payload: { id, oldIndex, newIndex }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Select Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted on selection change: UI:{selectEvent} with { ids, rows }.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Selectable
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render a leading checkbox column. Selection changes emit `selectEvent`.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Selected Ids
overridableConfigKeys.description: Currently-selected ids (controlled). Falls back to local state when omitted.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sort Column
overridableConfigKeys.description: Current sort column (display hint for the active header arrow).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sort Direction
overridableConfigKeys.description: Current sort direction (display hint).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sort Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted on sortable-header click: UI:{sortEvent} with { column, direction }.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sortable
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable in-container reorder; items can be dragged to new positions among siblings

capabilities: admin console table, records list, CRUD data table, user list, manage-users grid, sortable columns, row selection with bulk actions, grouped list view
